{{CargoOrgan
|name=Surya's Heart
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10864
|idx=71
|description=The heart emits a burning light. It is obvious that its former owner was a high-ranking deity, which allows such a miracle to be revealed!
|skill=
|hp=1370
|def=286
|atk=213
|rush=208
|gene1=Each round, {race} RUSH +60
|gene2=Each round, {race} ATK +60
|gene3=Healing +9%
|gene4=Restore 600 HP each round
|gene5=Domain Cabin, deployable robots +3
|gene7=Domain Cabin, deployable robots +9 (Awakened)
|}}
